titleStmt.title: SII 24.99: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 99. (A.R. No. 126 of 1938-39.) III PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of land by purchase, by the Śrīkāryam officer, Talaichchaṅgāṭṭu Śīriḷaṅgō-bhaṭṭar, for a flower garden to the temple. His full name is given as Talaichchaṅgāṭṭu Āttiraiyaṉ Picchaṉ Śīriḷaṅgō-bhaṭṭan and he is stated to be a resident of Rājarāja-chēri in Rājanārāyaṇa-chaturvēdi maṅgalam, a brahmadēya of Kuṟukkai-nāḍu, a sub-division of Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu. The record is dated in the 43rd year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
... svasti śrī . pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvarai yiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayalmuṉaik kontaḷavaraicar tanta
ḷamiriya vāḷurai kaḻittut toḷvali kāṭṭip porppari naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit tenticait temaru kamalappūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭai nanilappāvai tanimaiyun tavirttu punitaṟṟirumaṇi makuṭam Urimaiyir cūṭit tannaṭiyiraṇṭun taṭamuṭiyākat tonnila ventar
cūṭa munnai manuvāṟu peruka kaliyāṟu varuppac ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunila viḷākam Eṅkaṇun=tanātu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Orutani meruvil puliviḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟivāntarattup pūpālar tiṟai viṭi tan=ta kalañcorikaḷiṟu muṟai nirpa vilaṅkiya tennavan karun=talai paruntalait tiṭat tan
ponnakar purattiṭai kiṭappa Innāḷ piṟkulappiṟai col letir koṭā vikkalan tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvenat tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavuṟṟu Eṅkaṉum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟu viṭṭa tanmānamuṅ kūṟina viramuṅ kiṭappa Eṟinamalaikaḷu mutuku ne
ḷippa Iḻinta netikaḷum cuḻanṟuṭaintoṭa viḻunta kaṭalkaḷun talaivirittalamarak kuṭaticai tannāṭukantu tānuntāṉaiyum pannāḷiṭṭap palapala mutuku payantetir māṟi jayapperuntiruvum paḻiyukan=tu kuṭutta pukaḻin celviyum vāḷāroṇ kaṇ maṭantayariṭṭam miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niṟaiyu
ṅ kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaḷamennum pāṇiyiraṇṭum Oru vicaikkaik koṇṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅ koḷḷat tiruvuḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittaraṅka mum porparittalaṅkaḷum tantiravāriyum Uṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal tenkaṭal pāyvatu polat tanperuñce
nai Evip pañcavaraiyvarum poruta porkkaḷattañci veru neḷittoṭa Araṇe nappukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vanacarar tiriyum poccai veñcurameṟṟik koṟṟa vijayastampam ticai muttin calāpamu muttamiṭ potiyaṟu mattaveṅkaripaṭu maiy
yaccayyamuṅ kanniyuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellai kāṭṭik kuṭamalai nāṭ ṭuḷḷa cāveṟellān tani vicumpeṟa māveṟiya tan varutaniṟṟalaivarai kuṟukalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟitoṟu nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷi tiṟai ko siṅhāsanan=tiriya viṭṭaruḷip poṅkoḷiyāramun tiruppuyattaraṅ
kamum pola viramun tiyākamum viḷaṅka pār toḻac civaniṭattumaiyena tiyāka valli Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu virasiṅhāsanattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirāja kesaripanmarāna tripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī kolottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu nāṟpattu muṉṟāvatu śrī kāriyam talaiccaṅkāṭṭu ciriḷaṅkopaṭṭar E
val paṭi tiruvaraṅkattāḻvār kanmikaḷil śrī vayiṣṇavāriyam tiruvakiṅkapiccarum tirumā(li)liruñcolaidāsa nampiyum nampiyūr caṭakopanampiyum Irācūr ci caṭakopanampiyum kāñcikkuṟi tiruvaraṅkamāḷi nampiyum Eṭṭukkūr tiruvaṭimā nampiyum śrī paṇṭāra vāriyam Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarīkannum yan Ārāvamutum Āritan kecavan taniyiḷañ ciṅkamum Āritan cikā
rimāṟaṉum kācipan ciṅkan tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇanum pāratāyan kecuvanum periya para nnum sabhaikkaṇakku tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyān Ampalak kūttanānūṟṟuvap piriyannum śrīvayiṣṇavakkaṇakku tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyān Ārāvamutu villiyānum tiru Āḻvār kan(ma)mikaḷom virutarājapayaṅkara vijaya
pālaṟku kuṟukkaināṭu piramateyam rājanāraṇa catuppetimaṅkalattu rājarājaceri talacaṅkāṭu Āttiraiyan piccan ciriḷaṅkopaṭṭan Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷukku tiruppaḷḷitāmam cātti Aruḷḷukaikku Icaivikkiṟa tirunantavānam ciriḷaṅ kovukku Icaitta kiḻpārkkellai jeyaṅkoṇṭacoḻa muventa(ven=ta) veḷḷār cevvikkiṟa tirunantavanam
Uttamanitikku meṟkum tenpārkkellai(ya) virutarājapayaṅkara vicaiyapālar cevvik kiṟa kappakacallan ? tirunantavānattukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai(y) śrī puṇ ṭarīkan cevikkiṟa tirunantavānam Ārāvamutukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai(y) kāvi ṟku tekkumm Āka Icainta perunāṅkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa kuḻi(y) nūṟṟirupattu Añci(n)nāl nilamum kāṇiyum Ittirunantavā
nattu tirunantavānappuṟamāka nāṅkaḷ viṟṟurkuṭutta nilamāvatu rāja mahentra vaḷanāṭṭu viḷattūr nāṭṭu Āḻvār tirumaṭaippaḷḷippuṟamāna taṇ ṭuṟaiyil kāverikkulai Uṭai(y)ntu maṇalyiṭṭu payir ceyya Uṇṇātu kiṭanta nilattukku Icain=ta kiḻppākkellai ceyvitta cāmpan viḷākattukku meṟkum tenpākkellai taṇṭuṟai viḷai nilattukku vaṭakkum melpākkellai tirucciraāp
paḷḷi Uṭaiyār tevatānam llai kkum nilattu kiḻakkum vaṭapākkellai kaḷḷikkuṭaiyār Etirilicoḻa muventaveḷḷār tiruttivittu vaitta para ti ma viḷākattukku tekkum Āka Icainta perunānkellai Uḷpaṭṭa nilam Āṟu nnilam Āṟu māvum Iv yāṇṭu mutal kaikkoṇṭu tirunta tām veṇṭum payir ceytu muccuṭṭuṇṭu Innilattukku nilavilai(y) veli On ṟukku kācu 6
ka Innilam Aṟumāvilum vanta kācu Āṟumāvum Āḻvār śrīpaṇṭārat tey vaittu Innilattukku Iṟai ve(l)li Onṟukku punce varucaiyum paḷḷi koṇṭān marakkālāl Eṇkala nellāka vaḷan=ta nellu Irukala nel A śrī paṇṭāratte Aḷantu Itaṉ Iṟai mikuti koṇṭu Ittirunantavānam payir ceyyum Āḷ Iraṇṭukku perāl nellukku A māka nāḷ Onṟukku nellu patakkāka Āṇṭu
yanellu Āṟupatiṅkalamu piṭavai muta(l)lukku perāl kācu Onṟāka Āṇṭuvarai kācuṅ koṇṭu Ittirunantavānam ceyyakkaṭavarākavum Itu ceyyumiṭattu Innilattukku kulai kurampu cennir veṭṭiyallatu tiruvācalil ponta kuṭimai yepperppaṭṭatu ceyakkaṭavar Allātākavum Ippaṭi kovil tiruccuṟṟumāḷikaik kal veṭṭikkoḷḷak kaṭavarākavum Inta tirunantavānam ceyyum Iṭattu vempaṟṟūr cikurukūr Amutum
Ivan pakkattārum payir ceyyakkaṭavarākavum Ippaṭi sammatittu viṟṟukkuṭut tom virutarājapayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu kuṟukkaināṭṭu pirammateyam rājanāraṇac catuppetimaṅkalattu rājarā[ja*]ceri talaccaṅkāṭṭu Āttiraiyan piccan ciriḷaṅkopaṭṭanukku Āḻvār kanmikaḷom Ippaṭikku Ivai koyilkaṇakku tiruvaraṅ ka(m)muṭaiyān Araiyan Ampalakkūttanāna nānūṟṟuvappiriyannen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivaiy EStops here.
Digital edition of SII 24.99 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
